column1: # Synthetic Linux sysfs tree: aarch64 big.LITTLE (DynamIQ shape) — 1 package,
# 8 single-thread cores: cpu0-3 LITTLE (capacity 512, 1.8 GHz, shared 256K L2
# cluster), cpu4-7 big (capacity 1024, 2.8 GHz, shared 512K L2 cluster), one
# 4096K L3 (DSU) over all cores, no NUMA directory (single implicit node).
# Format: path<TAB>contents ("\n" escapes a newline); loaded by VirtualFs::load_manifest.
